meanings.definition: offer to buy, as of stocks and shares
mark with one's signature; write one's name (on)
examples: She signed the letter and sent it off
I subscribe to your view on abortion

meanings.definition: pay (an amount of money) as a contribution to a charity or service, especially at regular intervals
examples: I pledged $10 a month to my favorite radio station
We take the Times every day

meanings.definition: (of a contract or will or other document) having a signature written at the end
